overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player moves along neon-lit sidewalks beneath massive digital billboards and elevated highways, passing pedestrians with umbrellas in a high-tech urban environment characterized by reflective wet surfaces and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway beneath massive digital displays

events.description: pedestrian with umbrella passes in front of camera from right to left
exiting the covered walkway into more open area with less overhead cover

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered commercial corridor toward massive digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person with black umbrella walking toward camera on sidewalk
futuristic sedan driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: overhead structure with yellow neon trim providing partial cover
massive curved digital displays showing advertisements including ZEIG DICH and SET SAIL
rotating holographic display column with cyan and red graphics
tall pole with bright white light and green digital signage
tall building with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered neon-lit walkway with massive digital billboards visible ahead. The camera moves forward through the partially enclosed corridor, passing a holographic advertising pillar on the left. Wet pavement reflects the neon lights overhead. Pedestrians with umbrellas appear intermittently, and futuristic vehicles drive past on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with corporate architecture

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with corporate building on left
slight left turn to follow sidewalk curvature around building

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza area passing pedestrians and approaching elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead on sidewalk in same direction
pedestrian in white top and dark pants walking away from camera

entered.detail: large building with horizontal yellow neon accent lighting on multiple floors
wide open paved area with scattered pedestrians and minimal cover
massive curved overpass structure with yellow trim approaching in the distance
tall palm tree with illuminated base in planter

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a corporate glass building with horizontal yellow lighting on the left. The massive digital billboards now pass overhead to the left as the camera approaches a curved elevated highway structure in the distance. Palm trees and scattered pedestrians populate the open wet concrete area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with commercial storefronts

events.description: enters covered area beneath elevated highway overpass with darker lighting
futuristic vehicle with glowing undercarriage passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure alongside moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car with red taillights driving past on wet road
person in dark clothing walking toward camera under the overpass

entered.detail: commercial shop fronts with illuminated signs and neon lighting
bright red automated vending machine with glowing interface
large concrete blocks lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadowy space beneath a massive curved elevated highway overpass. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting dominating. Storefronts with neon signage line the left side while concrete barriers separate the sidewalk from the street traffic on the right. The wet pavement continues to reflect the overhead lights and vehicle headlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and tall corporate towers

events.description: exits covered underpass and approaches wide street intersection
crossing the street at marked crosswalk while vehicles wait
turning right to follow sidewalk along new street direction

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, waiting for traffic gap, and crossing the wet street toward tall buildings

notable_agents.action: multiple futuristic vehicles including a red sports car navigating the intersection
person in light clothing crossing the street ahead of camera

entered.detail: wide marked pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes on wet asphalt
cluster of high-rise glass buildings with illuminated windows towering ahead
massive vertical digital billboard displaying red and white graphics
contemporary building with geometric patterns and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the camera approaches a wide urban intersection with a marked crosswalk. Tall corporate towers rise in the distance against the night sky. The camera crosses the wet street, navigating between futuristic vehicles, and turns right to follow the new sidewalk. Massive digital screens and neon signage illuminate the open plaza area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon corridor into the expansive, rain-slicked heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins under a covered walkway, moving past holographic advertising pillars and reflecting neon lights on the wet pavement. As the camera exits the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide plaza featuring a corporate glass building and palm trees, with massive digital billboards passing overhead. The environment then shifts into the shadowy depths beneath a curved elevated highway overpass, where artificial lighting and neon storefronts dominate the darker atmosphere. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass to cross a wide urban intersection, navigating between futuristic vehicles toward a vista of towering corporate skyscrapers and glowing digital screens.
